title: The --hierarchical option causes failure with "--make gmake" option: Unsupported: unpacked arrays with protect-lib on 'val'

features.name: unpacked_array_on_port_with_protect_lib
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array dimension on a port declaration that has a packed array type, used with Verilator protect-lib in hierarchical build mode.

features.name: multi_dimensional_port_with_unpacked_dimension
features.description: Code should include a port that combines a packed array type (vector) with an unpacked array dimension, declared as input, output, or inout.
